title: Upon Coone. Epig.
content:
What is the reason Coone so dully smells?
    His nose is over-cool'd with icicles.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Coone. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
